external_services.service_name: Assessment and Collection of Additional Business Tax (Tax Audit)
external_services.who_may_avail: Private Individuals (Business owners with doubtful declarations)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Financial Statements (Original)
Income Tax Return (Filed copy)
Books of Accounts (Original)
Official Receipts / Sales Invoice (Duplicate copy)
Lease contract (if place of business is rented)
Other Financial Records

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all requirements to TORD
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Examine books and records; 1.2. Prepare Statement of Account for deficiencies
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer IV / II / I

steps.client_step: 2. Pay business tax deficiency, fees, and charges
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Business Tax (per Table A-S) + P50.00 Certification Fee
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Cash Receipts Division)

steps.client_step: 3. Receive Certificate of Tax Clearance
steps.agency_action: Issue Certificate of Audit Compliance
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer IV / I

external_services.service_name: Collection of Legal Claims thru Cash

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Approved payroll and voucher (Original)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements to Cash and Disbursement Division
steps.agency_action: Receive and check approved payroll and vouchers
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Admin Officer III / Admin Assistant II / V

steps.client_step: 2. Receive cash payment
steps.agency_action: Pay claimant
steps.person_responsible: Admin Officer III / Admin Assistant II / V

external_services.service_name: Collection of Legal Claims thru Checks

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Approved payroll and voucher (Original)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements to Cash and Disbursement Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Prepare check; 1.2. Review and ESRE encoding; 1.3. Sign the check
steps.person_responsible: City Treasurer / Admin Officer III / Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2. Receive check payment
steps.agency_action: Release check to claimant
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV / Admin Assistant V

external_services.service_name: Payment of Business Taxes, Fees and Other Charges

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished application form (BPLO encoded)
Certification of Real Property Tax Payment (Original)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements and secure Statement of Account
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness; 1.2. Compute taxes and fees; 1.3. Review and issue Tax Order of Payment (TOP)
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III/IV/I, Admin Assistants, Revenue Collection Officer III

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the business tax, fees, and charges
steps.agency_action: Receive payment based on SOA and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

external_services.service_name: Payment of Business Taxes, Fees and Other Charges from Business Retirement

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished Application Form for Retirement (BPLO encoded, includes Tax Declaration)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Business Permits and Licensing Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements to the Business Tax & Fees Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness; 1.2. Verify RPT settlement; 1.3. Compute taxes/fees; 1.4. Review and 1.5. Issue Tax Order of Payment (TOP)
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III/IV/I, Admin Assistants, Revenue Collections Officer III

steps.client_step: 2. Pay business tax, fees, and charges
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Business Tax (Table A-S) + P100.00 Retirement fee (if no declared sales)
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collections Clerk III/II (Cash Receipts Division)

external_services.note: Applications must be filed within 30 days of closure to avoid tax accumulation and penalties.

external_services.service_name: Payment of Fees from Building Permits, Occupancy Certificates and Building Repair Permits

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Order of Payment with summary of fees (Electrical, Mechanical, Plumbing, etc.)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the required documents to the Cash Receipts Division
steps.agency_action: Receive the Order of Payment and check for completeness
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required tax/fee and wait for the Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Order of Payment from CEO
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

total.fees: Based on Engineering Order of Payment

external_services.service_name: Payment of Fines on Violations of Ordinances
external_services.who_may_avail: Violators of national and local ordinances

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Citation Ticket or Order of Payment (Original)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the required document to the Cash Receipts Division
steps.agency_action: Receive the document and encode the details
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required fine and secure the Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: Receive payment, issue Official Receipt, and advise client to report to issuing office
steps.fees: Refer to Citation Ticket/Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

external_services.service_name: Payment of Professional Tax / Calling Fee

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PRC ID (Original or Photocopy)
Valid ID (Original or Photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all requirements
steps.agency_action: Receive documents and encode taxpayer data
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required professional tax/calling fee
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Declaration of Real Property Value (DRPV) or Tax Declaration
Latest Official Receipt (OR) of RPT payment

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements to the Land Tax Division and secure SOA
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness; 1.2. Compute RPT and issue Statement of Account (SOA)
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III/II/Assistant, Admin Assistant IV

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the RPT by showing the SOA and wait for the Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

external_services.service_name: Payment of Tax on Delivery Truck/Van and Issuance of Sticker
external_services.who_may_avail: Public/private individuals or corporations distributing goods

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Motor Vehicle Registration (Photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit motor vehicle registration
steps.agency_action: Receive and encode taxpayer data
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

steps.client_step: 2. Pay tax and fees
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Claim sticker at TORD
steps.agency_action: Check OR and issue delivery truck sticker
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer II/I

external_services.service_name: Request for Calibration of Weights and Measures
external_services.who_may_avail: Private individuals using weights/measures for business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Weights or measures to be calibrated (Physical) OR Letter Request

steps.client_step: 1. Present weights for calibration or request on-site calibration for gasoline pumps
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Calibrate weights/gasoline pumps and affix sticker; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Assistant / Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required calibration fee and sticker fee
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on fee table + P30.00 Calibration sticker
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II

external_services.service_name: Request for Real Property Tax Clearance

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Latest Tax Declaration (1 original copy)
Latest Official Receipt (OR) of RPT payment (1 original or 1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements and secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and check completeness; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment for Tax Clearance fee
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III/II, Treasury Operations Assistant, Admin Assistant IV

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required fee
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II (Cash Receipt Division)

steps.client_step: 3. Return to Windows 1-3 to claim Tax Clearance
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Check Official Receipt and prepare Tax Clearance; 3.2. Issue Tax Clearance
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III/II, Treasury Operations Assistant, Admin Assistant IV

external_services.service_name: Request for the Issuance of Transfer Tax Payment of Real Property and Certificate

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Official Receipt of Transfer Tax and Certification Fee
Updated Real Property Tax Clearance (1 original copy)
Updated Tax Declaration (Land, Building, Machineries) or Certificate of No Improvement
Deed of Absolute Sale, Donation, or Extra-Judicial Settlement (1 photocopy)
OCT / TCT (1 photocopy)
Certification Authorizing Registration (CAR) and BIR Tax Returns (CGT/Donor/Estate)
Documentary Stamp Return
Special Power of Attorney (if representative)
Valid Mayor's Permit (for Real Estate Developers/Operators)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements to Business Tax and Fees Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Compute and prepare Transfer Tax Order of Payment; 1.2. Computation for Simple Transfer or Extra Judicial Settlement
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III/II, Revenue Collections Clerk III

steps.client_step: 2. Pay transfer tax, fees and charges
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: 50% of 1% of total consideration/FMV + P50.00 Certification Fee
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collections Clerk II (Cash Receipts Division)

steps.client_step: 3. Receive Transfer Tax Certificate
steps.agency_action: Verify transfer tax documents, prepare and issue certification of transfer tax payment
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III, Admin Assistant IV, Acting Assistant City Treasurer

external_services.note: Late payment incurs 25% surcharge + 2% monthly interest (max 36 months).

external_services.service_name: Securing Accountable Forms (AF 51 and CTC) for the Barangays

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Bond risk number (1 original or 1 photocopy)
Clearance for previous requisitions (1 original or 1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements to TORD and secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness; 1.2. Issue Requisition Slip and Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer IV/II/I, Local Revenue Collections Officer III

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required fees
steps.agency_action: Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III (Cash Receipts Division)

steps.client_step: 3. Return to TORD for the issuance of Accountable Form
steps.agency_action: Check Official Receipt and issue the accountable forms
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer IV/II/I, Local Revenue Collections Officer III

external_services.note: Barangay clearance is a prerequisite for city-level licenses. Barangay Treasurers are deputized to collect community tax, with 50% of proceeds accruing to the barangay.
